scope: TG-P14 Phase 0 evidence-only attribution of the residual ctx4096 promotion miss

gap_reconstruction_from_existing_artifac.ctx4096_delta_is_all_attention: every non-attention kernel (weight GEMV, FFN, norms) is identical across arms; only the attention route differs, so the whole 0.254ms/token delta is in the attention route
gap_reconstruction_from_existing_artifac.note: reaching 98% needs candidate_w_ms <= owned/0.98 = 10.049ms; current 10.102ms -> shave ~0.053ms (~0.5pp)

attribution.live_split_tile_at_ctx4096: converges to fixed-L: per = ceildiv(Tc,S) rounded to TK -> 128 at ctx4096 = 8 blocks/split = old L=128. So live-split gives NO tile benefit at ctx4096 (only helps low ctx); the ctx4096 gain (95.6->97.5) came entirely from the fused combine.
attribution.fused_combine: saturated: 1 kernel, 128x fexp reduction (Hq*Hd*S -> Hq*S). Isolation shows shipped->fused combine already recovered ~2.1pp at ctx4096 (95.4->97.5). Little combine headroom left.

tile_inner_loop_structure.score_qk: VECTORIZED: __builtin_amdgcn_fdot2 (v_dot2) over half pairs -- already optimal
tile_inner_loop_structure.pv_accumulate: SCALAR: acc[dd] = acc[dd]*corr + p*vd looped over dd in range(R=4), one V element at a time, each .cast(F32). No vectorized V load, no packed FMA.
tile_inner_loop_structure.v_source: K_ONLY (model default, DECODE_FLASH_BLOCK_TILE_G5_KONLY=1): V read from GLOBAL cache during PV. KV_BOTH (exists, default-off): V from 8KB LDS.
tile_inner_loop_structure.v_layout: d = lane*R + dd -> each lane owns R=4 CONTIGUOUS columns -> a single half4 (64-bit) V load is directly expressible; the layout already supports vectorization, only the accumulate loop is scalar
tile_inner_loop_structure.acc_storage: REG placeholder (R,) f32 -> already a per-lane 4-wide register array; vectorizable as vec4

ranked_hypotheses.reason: the p*V accumulate is the ONLY remaining scalar inner loop (score is v_dot2, combine is fused). Each lane does R=4 scalar FMAs with per-element V loads; at ctx4096 (32 valid splits x TK=16 rows) this inner loop dominates the residual tile cost. Owned vectorizes the V load + FMA.

K_ONLY reads V from global (L2 latency); owned stages V in 8KB LDS. Coupled to #1: a vectorized V load is cheapest from LDS (ds_read_b64). KV_BOTH exists but doubles LDS (occupancy cost) -- must be measured, not assumed.
the lane*R d-sharding already yields contiguous per-lane V columns (vectorizable) -- layout is not the blocker, but confirms #1 is expressible without a relayout.
K_ONLY was chosen FOR occupancy; KV_BOTH trades LDS for it. Verify KV_BOTH+vectorized-V does not regress occupancy at ctx4096.
the scalar PV loop is a structural codegen shape, not a scheduling artifact; unlikely to be the primary lever.

the target is only 0.5pp from 98% and run-to-run spread can be ~0.5-1pp; ctx512 passes stably at 99.1% (NMEAS=40) and the delta is structurally explained, but the Phase 2 W==D verify MUST report measurement spread and not credit a sub-spread win.

proposed_primitive.name: vectorized-V PV tile step (generated UOp)
proposed_primitive.what: Replace the scalar `for dd in range(R): acc[dd] = acc[dd]*corr + p*vd` PV accumulate with a single vec-R (R=4 -> half4/f32x4) V load + a vectorized FMA: acc_vec = acc_vec*corr + p*v_vec. corr and p are per-token scalars, so this is scalar*vec4 + scalar*vec4 (packed FMA). Mirrors the already-working v_dot2 score path but for the p*V accumulate.
proposed_primitive.v_load: each lane's R=4 contiguous columns as one 64-bit load: ds_read_b64 from LDS under KV_BOTH (preferred), or global_load_dwordx2 under K_ONLY.
proposed_primitive.why_smallest: the d-sharding layout and REG(R,) accumulator already support vectorization; no relayout, no new LDS geometry needed for the K_ONLY variant. It is the single remaining scalar hotspot after score (v_dot2) and combine (fused) were closed.
proposed_primitive.safety: generated UOp only (no HIP/ASM), no model-name branch, wire behind a NEW explicit flag default-off, owned stays default.
phase1_cheap_probes_before_implementatio: (a) measure existing KV_BOTH vs K_ONLY at ctx4096 W==D (free -- KV_BOTH already exists) to size the V-from-LDS lever alone before vectorizing;
(b) isolated numeric equivalence of the vectorized-V PV accumulate vs the scalar one (generated-UOp compile + numeric vs reference, deterministic -- like the P10/P14.8 repros).

next: Await review of this summary before any implementation (Phase 2 route integration is default-off, prefilled-KV/NLL correctness authority, W==D at ctx512+ctx4096 with reported spread).
